name: Safeco Corporation
description: Safeco Insurance, originally founded in Seattle in 1923 as the Selective Auto and Fire Ensurance Company of America, is a prominent American insurance provider. Acquired by Liberty Mutual in 2008, the company specializes in personal lines of insurance, including auto, homeowners, and specialty property coverage. Safeco distributes its products primarily through a vast network of independent insurance agents across the United States. While it has operated as a key subsidiary of the Liberty Mutual Group for many years, the brand has been integrated into the broader Liberty Mutual portfolio to provide comprehensive protection and financial security.
